hero.badge: Hong Kong Based · Serving Asia & Beyond
hero.headline: Be Seen. Be Chosen.
hero.tagline: Asia's leading MarTech AI & ORM agency. We combine AI social intelligence with authentic community advocacy to protect and grow your brand reputation across Asia.

trust.headline: Trusted by leading enterprise brands across Hong Kong & Asia

why.headline: We Don't Follow Markets. We Shape Them.
why.subheadline: Three capabilities that set CDMC apart from every traditional marketing agency in Asia.

intelligence.title: AI Social Intelligence
intelligence.description: We use AI social listening to find the questions consumers are asking that your competitors haven't answered — then we help you own those conversations.

advocacy.title: Real Community Advocacy
advocacy.description: No fake reviews. Our Matrix Seeding places authentic consumer voices at critical decision points, building brand trust that converts and endures.

data.title: Business-Grade Data Reports
data.description: Our reports go beyond vanity metrics — Share of Voice, Sentiment Analysis, Engagement Quality — intelligence that directly drives your next commercial decision.

services.headline: End-to-End Reputation Management
services.subheadline: From diagnosis to execution — we protect, build, and amplify your brand across every digital channel.

orm.title: Online Reputation Management
orm.description: Monitor, protect, and shape your brand narrative across all digital channels with AI-powered precision.

social.title: Social Intelligence & Analytics
social.description: Real-time AI listening across Xiaohongshu, Instagram, Threads and beyond. Uncover competitor blind spots.

wom.title: KOC Seeding & Word-of-Mouth
wom.description: 10,000+ verified authentic KOCs creating and distributing real consumer advocacy that converts.

crisis.title: Crisis Management
crisis.description: 24/7 rapid response. When your reputation is at risk, we act within hours — not days.

industries.headline: Deep Expertise. Real Results.
industries.subheadline: We specialise in three high-stakes verticals where reputation is everything.

finance.title: Finance & Insurance
finance.description: Establish credibility, manage regulatory scrutiny, and build lasting trust with high-net-worth clients across Asia.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce & Retail
ecommerce.description: Drive authentic reviews, manage cross-border reputation, and dominate the discovery funnel on Xiaohongshu and beyond.

aesthetics.title: Aesthetics & Medical Beauty
aesthetics.description: Protect your clinic's reputation, attract new patients, and manage sensitive reviews with discretion and speed.

caseStudies.headline: Real Results for Real Brands
caseStudies.subheadline: Measured outcomes across Asia's most competitive verticals.

cta.headline: Ready to Own Your Reputation in Asia?
cta.subheadline: Book a free 30-minute consultation. Our strategists will analyse your current brand reputation and show you exactly where the opportunities lie.
cta.disclaimer: No commitment required. Free brand reputation audit included.
